embeds.title: Travel
embeds.description:
*A sign posted in the square points the direction to the various sections of the city.*

⛩️ - Leave the city by way of the Blessed Gate

🏘️ - Travel to the Residential Quarter via North Street

💰 - Travel to the Mercantile Quarter via East Street

🏯 - Travel to the Administrative District via West Street

🎭 - Enter the Entertainment District via South Street

🪦 - Leave the city by way of the Cursed Gate

***Menu Command***
`/rolemenu create group:Loc:CitySquare nodm:True rr:True m:<last_id>`
